description_long: This cathedral features a grand symmetrical facade with two tall, square bell towers flanking the main entrance, each adorned with arched windows and topped with domed cupolas. The central nave is covered by a large, ornate dome with a lantern, and the roofline is punctuated by smaller decorative spires and balustrades. The main body of the building is constructed from dark stone, contrasted by lighter stonework and stucco on the side and rear walls. The facade is richly ornamented with columns, arches, and sculptural reliefs, while the side walls are more austere, featuring a series of arched windows and buttresses. The rear of the cathedral showcases the prominent dome and apse, with minimal decorative elements. The structure is monumental in scale, designed to dominate its urban surroundings and serve as a focal point for religious gatherings.
description: A grand cathedral with twin bell towers, a large central dome, and an ornate stone facade featuring columns and arches. The structure combines dark stone with lighter stucco and is richly decorated at the front.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the twin bell towers, the main ornate entrance, and the central dome rising behind the facade.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the depth of the nave, the side walls with arched windows, and the profile of the dome and towers.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the large dome, the apse, and the simpler, less ornamented back walls with circular windows.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the length of the cathedral, the side entrances, and the detailed structure of the bell towers.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: The main facade is richly decorated with columns, arches, sculptural reliefs, and ornamental stonework. The bell towers and entry portal feature additional decorative elements, enhancing the grandeur of the entrance.
attribute_entry_portal_design: The main entry portal features a large, rounded arch flanked by columns and topped with sculptural reliefs. The doors are grand and likely wooden, with intricate carvings and decorative stonework surrounding the entrance.
